label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's or enterprise's network strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction about market growth or technology adoption

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or technology

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a network technology's maturity or fitness

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Case study outcome or comparative supplier result

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of the NIS service category framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic or market definition

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment from Aberdeen analyst

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of network integration industry structure and dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of 21 network integration vendors

label: Benchmarking
definition: Case study-based comparison of NIS provider outcomes

label: Field Research
definition: Primary research via IT executive surveys and interviews

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents and post-publication records

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources
